SANITY
STAMINA
ALMOND WATER 0/0
LEVEL 1

THE BACKROOMS

— SCP DESCENT —

Ten levels deep into the wrongness. On every floor a different anomaly hunts you, and each is deadlier than the last. Find the buzzing green EXIT to descend.

Drink almond water to restore sanity. Read each anomaly carefully — some kill you for looking, some for running, some walk straight through the walls.

WASD / Arrows — move  ·  Mouse — look  ·  Shift — run  ·  M — map

Best with sound on. Headphones recommended.
